Time-on-Time
PHRF corrected time = elapsed time * 650 / (600 + rating) Light (5-10) Wind
ORC corrected time = elapsed time * rating
Average boat speed of first 5 finishers = 4.36

ORCWS average = 7.640
From the first three boats (based on elapsed time) in each ORC class

RET = Retired
DNS = Did not start
DNC = Did not compete
CB = Committee boat

STYC scoring (Thu, Jan 15, 2026 - 10:46:20 ver)
